agentFindings: I investigated the website https://vibhorfoods.com as requested. I browsed the homepage and found it clearly branded as Vibhor Cooking Oils. I clicked on navigation items leading to category and product pages and found all product pages consistent with Vibhor branding and identity. There were no mentions or impersonations of Flipkart, Flipkart Minutes, Cleartrip, or Myntra anywhere on the site. The footer contains contact information and social media handles solely related to Vibhor Cooking Oils, with no references to the requested brands. No login or signup pages or links were found, and no content resembling those brands was observed anywhere. Overall, the site appears to be an authentic Vibhor Cooking Oils website with no evidence of brand abuse or impersonation of the requested brands.
